item.title: willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 6min Don’t completely hate this idea. But an exhibition game between the All Ireland
item.description: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 6min Don’t completely hate this idea. But an exhibition game between the All Ireland winners and League winners (without those still in club) would be better than holding back a national final. Cita Irish Examiner Sport @ExaminerSport · 4h GAA pondering League final switch to coincide with Adare Ryder Cup https:// irishexaminer.com/sport/gaa/arid -41827556.html … 2 2 314

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 27min INTERVIEW: @OfficialWexGAA Jack O'Connor discusses the development of new players, a com
item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 27min INTERVIEW: @OfficialWexGAA Jack O'Connor discusses the development of new players, a competitive @gaaleinster SHC, and enjoying hurling #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-wexford-2 … 808

item.title: DeclanBogue: Declan Bogue @DeclanBogue · 58min Conor Glass tells more than almost any player in the game about the culture and traini
item.description:
Declan Bogue @DeclanBogue · 58min Conor Glass tells more than almost any player in the game about the culture and training of county teams. This is serious insight. Cita The42.ie @The42_ie · 3h Conor Glass talks about a full year with no wins for a Derry side that recently won back to back Ulster titles, and the scar tissue that remained.
http:// jrnl.ie/7012393f 4 969

item.title: willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 1h First edition of the 2026 Hurling Power rankings. Updates every Wednesday, with @
item.description:
Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 1h First edition of the 2026 Hurling Power rankings. Updates every Wednesday, with @TomasORuanaidh doing football on Tuesdays
https:// youtu.be/6-h3XB2h-xs?is =Nzryr0XWqa8dA-tU … Cita Off The Ball @offtheball · 2h 𝐇𝐀𝐑𝐕𝐄𝐘 𝐍𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐀𝐍 𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐓 𝐎𝐅 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐖𝐄𝐄𝐊
"We have a national obsession with overrating Cork..."
It's time for the #hurling Power Rankings with Will O'Callaghan! Himself and Mick discuss whether Cork deserve their unbeatable reputation..!
The Power Rankings 1 990

item.title:
BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 2h Will the title be decided on Friday night?
Watch Glentoran v Larne live on BBC iPlayer
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 2h Will the title be decided on Friday night?
Watch Glentoran v Larne live on BBC iPlayer and the BBC Sport website on Friday night to find out!
#BBCFootball #BBCIrishPrem
Send us your predictions below 1 3 1 mil
